title: Harnas Agent Manifest
description: Normative schema for the Harnas Agent Manifest format, v0.1. See spec/18-agent-manifest.md.

harnas_version.description: Manifest spec version. v0.1 accepts only the literal '0.1'.

system.description: Optional system prompt. When present, the runtime MUST project it into the provider-specific system-message slot (Anthropic top-level `system`, OpenAI `role: "system"` message, Gemini `systemInstruction`).

kind.description: Selects the Projection + Provider + Ingestor triplet.

model.description: Model identifier. Required for non-mock providers.

max_tokens.description: Upper bound on response length, in tokens.

tools.description: Tools the agent may invoke. Empty array means no tools.

name.description: Tool name, unique within this manifest.

handler.description: Symbolic reference to the tool implementation, resolved by the runtime against a handler map.

description.description: Tool description, passed to the provider.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the tool's argument shape.

config.description: Implementer-opaque JSON-serializable configuration preserved with the tool entry and made available to the resolved handler.

strategies.description: Canonical strategies (Layer 2) to install. Empty array means no strategies.

name.description: Canonical strategy name, e.g. 'Compaction::Snip'. Matches the directory structure under spec/strategies/.

config.description: Configuration passed to the strategy's install method. Must match the strategy's Configuration section in its spec stub. Callable parameters are given as symbolic references (Strings) here.

hooks.description: Hook handlers to install at Session start. Empty or absent means no manifest-declared hooks.

handler.description: Symbolic reference to the hook implementation, resolved by the runtime against a handler map.

config.description: Configuration passed to the handler at install time.
